"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\test.dir/objects.a
C:\w64devkit\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\test.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\w64devkit\bin\c++.exe  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-long-long -pedantic -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtest.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
